name: orkestr-oss
description: Local-first personal agent workstation: setup, connectors, virtual browsers, WhatsApp, and timers.

scripts.check: find apps packages scripts examples -path '*/node_modules/*' -prune -o \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -print | while read -r file; do node --check "$file"; done && node --test
